top_signals.title: Macron’s Central-Bank Pick Moulin Faces Parliamentary Showdown
top_signals.summary: Emmanuel Macron’s pick to lead the Bank of France will be grilled on Wednesday by lawmakers who could scupper the president’s plan to install a top ally at the helm of monetary policy.

top_signals.title: Microsoft blames macOS update for undismissible Teams location prompts
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has confirmed user reports that the Teams team collaboration app is displaying non-dismissible location prompts on some macOS systems. [...]
